name: Pumpkin Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. In a mixing bowl, beat together the sugar, pumpkin, oil, and vanilla.
2. Sift together the dry ingredients (flour, soda, baking powder, salt, cinnamon, nutmeg, ginger).
3. Add the sifted dry ingredients to the wet mixture and stir until smooth.
4. Blend in the raisins and chopped nuts.
5. Drop by teaspoonful onto a lightly oiled baking sheet.
6. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 12 to 15 minutes.
7. Makes about 7 dozen cookies. No eggs are needed in these moist, soft cookies.
